notableEvents.label: Ryan McMahon pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan McMahon called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Trent Grisham pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Trent Grisham grounds out, second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Casey Schmitt. José Caballero to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Ryan McMahon pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan McMahon walks. Giancarlo Stanton to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Austin Wells GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Austin Wells grounds into a double play, second baseman Luis Arraez to shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Trent Grisham out at 2nd. Austin Wells out at 1st.
